'''Krax's castle''' was the home of the [[Krax family]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tahlboor]]. It was located near [[Mount Yeroc]]. Many [[Hobor]] guards patrolled the expansive grounds.

Around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], the castle served as the staging ground for [[Troob]] forces prior to the near-siege of the [[Hobor]]s and the [[sky cannon]] within Mount Yeroc. During this time, [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] sent several guards off to the apparently nonexistent [[Narthex Antechamber]], in a ruse to steal a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] and rescue [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[Larka Nimondro]].
